requirement_topic.en: PSQCA Market Access, Marking, and Import Path
requirement_topic.zh: PSQCA 市场准入、标识与进口路径
requirement_topic.zht: PSQCA 市場准入、標識與進口路徑

summary.en: Pakistan market access is governed by PSQCA under the PSQCA Act 1996. Where a product type is on the PSQCA Conformity Assessment list, a conformity certificate and PSQCA marking are mandatory before sale, and goods clear via ports such as Karachi and Port Qasim with an in-country importer of record. Energy-using products may also fall under NEECA energy-efficiency measures. There is no single CE-style mark; obligations are product-list-driven through PSQCA plus PTA for radio.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦市场准入由 PSQCA 依据《PSQCA 法 1996》管理。当某产品类型列入 PSQCA 合格评定清单时，销售前须取得合格证书和 PSQCA 标识，货物经卡拉奇、卡西姆港等口岸并由本地进口商作为进口记录方清关。耗能产品还可能落入 NEECA 能效措施。不存在单一的 CE 式标志；义务以产品清单为驱动，通过 PSQCA 加无线电的 PTA 实现。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦市場准入由 PSQCA 依據《PSQCA 法 1996》管理。當某產品類型列入 PSQCA 合格評定清單時，銷售前須取得合格證書和 PSQCA 標識，貨物經卡拉奇、卡西姆港等口岸並由本地進口商作為進口記錄方清關。耗能產品還可能落入 NEECA 能效措施。不存在單一的 CE 式標誌；義務以產品清單為驅動，透過 PSQCA 加無線電的 PTA 實現。

standards_or_laws: PSQCA Act 1996 and Conformity Assessment / mandatory marking list
PTA type approval for radio function of wireless or cordless tools
NEECA energy-efficiency measures where the product is an energy-using item
In-country importer of record; clearance via Karachi / Port Qasim

summary.en: China power-tool files commonly reference the GB/T 3883 series and, where applicable, CCC for the China domestic market. CCC and GB/T evidence do not confer Pakistan market access: they do not replace PSQCA conformity, PSQCA marking, PTA radio approval, or the in-country importer arrangement.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具文件通常引用 GB/T 3883 系列，并在适用时引用面向中国国内市场的 CCC。CCC 与 GB/T 证据不赋予巴基斯坦市场准入：它们不能替代 PSQCA 合格评定、PSQCA 标识、PTA 无线电核准或本地进口商安排。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具文件通常引用 GB/T 3883 系列，並在適用時引用面向中國國內市場的 CCC。CCC 與 GB/T 證據不賦予巴基斯坦市場准入：它們不能替代 PSQCA 合格評定、PSQCA 標識、PTA 無線電核准或本地進口商安排。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) where applicable to the China domestic market

gap.en: A China domestic certificate (GB/T or CCC) is not enough for Pakistan placement. The importer needs PSQCA conformity and marking where the tool is listed, PTA approval for any radio module, an in-country importer of record, and screening against NEECA where the product is energy-using, all mapped to the Pakistan legal framework rather than the EU CE framework.
gap.zh: 中国国内证书（GB/T 或 CCC）不足以支持投放巴基斯坦市场。当工具列名时，进口商需要 PSQCA 合格评定与标识、任何无线电模块的 PTA 核准、本地进口记录方，以及在产品为耗能品时按 NEECA 筛查，并全部映射到巴基斯坦法律框架，而非欧盟 CE 框架。
gap.zht: 中國國內證書（GB/T 或 CCC）不足以支援投放巴基斯坦市場。當工具列名時，進口商需要 PSQCA 合格評定與標識、任何無線電模組的 PTA 核准、本地進口記錄方，以及在產品為耗能品時按 NEECA 篩查，並全部映射到巴基斯坦法律框架，而非歐盟 CE 框架。

target.en: Mandatory where listed: PSQCA conformity and marking under the PSQCA Act 1996. Mandatory for radio function: PTA type approval. NEECA energy-efficiency measures apply where the product is an in-scope energy-using item.
target.zh: 列名时强制：依《PSQCA 法 1996》取得 PSQCA 合格评定与标识。无线电功能强制：PTA 型号核准。当产品为适用耗能品时适用 NEECA 能效措施。
target.zht: 列名時強制：依《PSQCA 法 1996》取得 PSQCA 合格評定與標識。無線電功能強制：PTA 型號核准。當產品為適用耗能品時適用 NEECA 能效措施。

cn.en: Mandatory China domestic baseline commonly uses the GB/T 3883 series, with CCC where applicable to the China market.
cn.zh: 中国境内强制基线通常采用 GB/T 3883 系列，并在适用于中国市场时采用 CCC。
cn.zht: 中國境內強制基線通常採用 GB/T 3883 系列，並在適用於中國市場時採用 CCC。

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Pakistan-ready on GB/T or CCC evidence alone; obtain PSQCA conformity and marking where the tool is listed, PTA approval for any radio module, an in-country importer, and NEECA screening for energy-using products before placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅凭 GB/T 或 CCC 证据不能视为巴基斯坦就绪；应在列名时取得 PSQCA 合格评定与标识、对任何无线电模块取得 PTA 核准、设立本地进口商，并对耗能产品进行 NEECA 筛查后再行投放。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅憑 GB/T 或 CCC 證據不能視為巴基斯坦就緒；應在列名時取得 PSQCA 合格評定與標識、對任何無線電模組取得 PTA 核准、設立本地進口商，並對耗能產品進行 NEECA 篩查後再行投放。
